title: Man in the Mirror
why_this_song: Man in the Mirror by Michael Jackson (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 23 times; first heard in: "I'm gonna make a change"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Take a look at yourself and then make a change"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "They follow each other on the wind ya know"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm starting with the man in the mirror"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "If they wanna make the world a better place"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And no message could've been any clearer
If they wanna make the world a better place
Take a look at yourself and then make a change

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "change" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "change" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yourself" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yourself" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That there are some with no home

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm asking him to change his ways (oh)
I've got to make that change today

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Man in the Mirror" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Man in the Mirror" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Man in the Mirror", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Man in the Mirror", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Man in the Mirror" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Man in the Mirror" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
